en: About that time Herod the king laid violent hands on some who belonged to the church.
zh: 那時，希律王下手苦害教會中的幾個人，

en: He killed James the brother of John with the sword,
zh: 用刀殺了約翰的哥哥雅各。

en: and when he saw that it pleased the Jews, he proceeded to arrest Peter also. This was during the days of Unleavened Bread.
zh: 他見這事博得了猶太人的歡心，就在除酵節期間，再次捉拿彼得。

en: And when he had seized him, he put him in prison, delivering him over to four squads of soldiers to guard him, intending after the Passover to bring him out to the people.
zh: 捉到了，就把他關在監裡，交給四班士兵看守，每班四個人，打算過了逾越節，把他提出來交給民眾。

en: So Peter was kept in prison, but earnest prayer for him was made to God by the church.
zh: 彼得就這樣被拘留在監裡；但教會卻為他迫切地祈求 神。

en: Now when Herod was about to bring him out, on that very night, Peter was sleeping between two soldiers, bound with two chains, and sentries before the door were guarding the prison.
zh: 希律要提他出來的前一夜，彼得被兩條鎖鍊鎖住，睡在兩個士兵中間，還有衛兵守在門前。

en: And behold, an angel of the Lord stood next to him, and a light shone in the cell. He struck Peter on the side and woke him, saying, "Get up quickly." And the chains fell off his hands.
zh: 忽然，有主的一位使者出現，牢房裡就光芒四射。天使拍拍彼得的肋旁，喚醒他，說：“快起來！”他手上的鎖鍊就脫落了。

en: And the angel said to him, "Dress yourself and put on your sandals." And he did so. And he said to him, "Wrap your cloak around you and follow me."
zh: 天使對他說：“束上帶子，穿上鞋！”他就這樣作了。天使又說：“披上外衣，跟我走！”

en: And he went out and followed him. He did not know that what was being done by the angel was real, but thought he was seeing a vision.
zh: 他就出來跟著天使走，但他不知道天使所作的事是真的，還以為是見了異象。

en: When they had passed the first and the second guard, they came to the iron gate leading into the city. It opened for them of its own accord, and they went out and went along one street, and immediately the angel left him.
zh: 他們經過第一、第二兩個崗位，來到通往城內的鐵門，那門自動給他們開了。他們出來，往前走了一條街，天使立刻離開了他。

en: When Peter came to himself, he said, "Now I am sure that the Lord has sent his angel and rescued me from the hand of Herod and from all that the Jewish people were expecting."
zh: 彼得清醒過來，說：“現在我確實知道，主差他的天使來，救我脫離希律的手和猶太人所期望的一切。”

en: When he realized this, he went to the house of Mary, the mother of John whose other name was Mark, where many were gathered together and were praying.
zh: 他明白了之後，就到約翰 的母親馬利亞家裡去；有許多人聚集在那裡禱告。

en: And when he knocked at the door of the gateway, a servant girl named Rhoda came to answer.
zh: 彼得敲了大門，有一個名叫羅大的使女，出來應門。

en: Recognizing Peter's voice, in her joy she did not open the gate but ran in and reported that Peter was standing at the gate.
zh: 她認出是彼得的聲音，歡喜到顧不得開門，就跑進去報告，說彼得站在門外。

en: They said to her, "You are out of your mind." But she kept insisting that it was so, and they kept saying, "It is his angel!"
zh: 大家說：“你瘋了！”她卻堅持地說這是真的。他們說：“一定是他的天使。”

en: But Peter continued knocking, and when they opened, they saw him and were amazed.
zh: 彼得繼續敲門；他們打開了，一見是他，就非常驚訝。

en: But motioning to them with his hand to be silent, he described to them how the Lord had brought him out of the prison. And he said, "Tell these things to James and to the brothers." Then he departed and went to another place.
zh: 彼得作了一個手勢，要他們安靜，然後對他們述說主怎樣領他出監，又說：“你們把這些事告訴雅各和眾弟兄。”就離開那裡，到別的地方去了。

en: Now when day came, there was no little disturbance among the soldiers over what had become of Peter.
zh: 天亮的時候，士兵們非常慌亂，不知彼得出了甚麼事。

en: And after Herod searched for him and did not find him, he examined the sentries and ordered that they should be put to death. Then he went down from Judea to Caesarea and spent time there.
zh: 希律搜索他，卻找不到，就審問衛兵，下令把他們帶出去處死。後來希律離開猶太，到該撒利亞去，住在那裡。

en: Now Herod was angry with the people of Tyre and Sidon, and they came to him with one accord, and having persuaded Blastus, the king's chamberlain, they asked for peace, because their country depended on the king's country for food.
zh: 當時希律對推羅和西頓人懷怒在心。這兩地的人因為他們的地區都需要從王的領土得到糧食，就先拉攏了王的內侍臣伯拉斯都，然後同心地去見希律，要向他求和。

en: On an appointed day Herod put on his royal robes, took his seat upon the throne, and delivered an oration to them.
zh: 到了定好的日期，希律穿上王服，坐在高臺上，向他們演講。

en: And the people were shouting, "The voice of a god, and not of a man!"
zh: 群眾大聲說：“這是 神的聲音，不是人的聲音！”

en: Immediately an angel of the Lord struck him down, because he did not give God the glory, and he was eaten by worms and breathed his last.
zh: 他不歸榮耀給 神，所以主的使者立刻擊打他，他被蟲咬，就斷了氣。

en: But the word of God increased and multiplied.
zh: 神的道日漸興旺，越發廣傳。

en: And Barnabas and Saul returned from Jerusalem when they had completed their service, bringing with them John, whose other name was Mark.
zh: 巴拿巴和掃羅完成了送交捐項的任務，就帶著名叫馬可的約翰，從耶路撒冷回來。
